checks.description: Template rebuild must be driven by a CyberPPT dual-image pair manifest with full and background images for every page.
Template rebuild must produce source_capture pages from the dual-image inputs.
Template rebuild must have at least one valid scene graph gate.
Template/body content region coordinates must be declared before template assembly QA.
Template-stage editable text must not fall below the configured minimum font size.
Peer text with the same semantic role must use consistent font weight.
Template stage must derive container workspaces before final QA.
Template work slots must avoid detected scene graph and visual registry non-writable zones.
Template text must have a workspace assignment with every assigned text inside its slot.

blocking_errors.description: Template rebuild must produce source_capture pages from the dual-image inputs.
Template-stage editable text must not fall below the configured minimum font size.
Template stage must derive container workspaces before final QA.
Template text must have a workspace assignment with every assigned text inside its slot.

checks.description: Template rebuild must consume required template files and export state.
Template rebuild must consume source_capture and pass its gate.
Template QA must keep a visual reference for post-template comparison.
Final template-stage QA must include an Office/WPS render evidence artifact.
Template-stage visual QA gate must pass using render comparison and spatial registration evidence.

blocking_errors.description: Template rebuild must consume source_capture and pass its gate.
Template QA must keep a visual reference for post-template comparison.
Final template-stage QA must include an Office/WPS render evidence artifact.
Template-stage visual QA gate must pass using render comparison and spatial registration evidence.

blocking_gaps.message: Source-to-render delta fields are placeholders until post-render measurement is attached.
Source-to-render delta fields are placeholders until post-render measurement is attached.
